code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      nums = list.push(nums, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  let t_str = string.trim(line2)
  let t = match string.parse_int(t_str)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end

  mut filtered: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  while j < nums.len()
    let v = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(n)
      n
    when None
      0
    end
    if v > t
      filtered = list.push(filtered, v)
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < filtered.len()
    let v = match filtered.get(k)
    when Some(n)
      n
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end

  println(out)
  Ok(())
end
